ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS
Language: php
A free, self-hostable news aggregator…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrestaShop/PrestaShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop
Language: php
PrestaShop is the universal open-source software platform to build your e-commerce solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Qloapps/QloApps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Qloapps/QloApps
Language: php
QloApps is a Free and Open-source hotel management and reservation system to take a hotel business online. QloApps offers a Property Management System (PMS), a Booking Engine, and an attractive Hotel Website. Elevate hotel operations with QloApps to streamline processes and provide an enhanced experience for both hoteliers and guests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/framework
Language: php
Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openemr/openemr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openemr/openemr
Language: php
The most popular open source electronic health records and medical practice management solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface. If you like this project, please give it a star! Doing so helps maintain Popular OSS status for the project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: osTicket/osTicket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/osTicket/osTicket
Language: php
The osTicket open source ticketing system official project repository, for versions 1.8 and later
